channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Israel Expands Strikes Across Southern and Eastern Lebanon
item.description: Lebanese state media reported a new wave of Israeli strikes, artillery fire, and drone activity across southern and eastern Lebanon, signaling a broader and more intense phase of attacks. The reported...

item.title: Items Stolen from James Bulger’s Vandalised Grave Recovered
item.description: The family of James Bulger, the two-year-old boy abducted and murdered in 1993, have recovered items stolen from his grave after it was vandalised earlier this year. The incident occurred in Kirkdale ...

item.title: Sara Duterte commends Army unit after deadly Negros clash with alleged NPA members
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte publicly commended the Philippine Army’s 79th Infantry Battalion (79IB) following what she described as a successful recent combat operation. In her statement, Duterte prai...

item.title: Himanta Biswa Sarma links Bengal polls to concerns over cross-border infiltration
item.description: Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma has stated that the ongoing West Bengal Assembly elections carry significance for the entire country, linking the outcome to concerns over illegal infiltration...

item.title: Kirby Dach bounces back with key performance after criticism from fans
item.description: Kirby Dach, the Montreal Canadiens forward, experienced a dramatic turnaround after receiving criticism from fans following a costly mistake in a 3-2 loss to the Tampa Bay Lightning. The error led to ...

item.title: O’jez Ladder Table Tennis Tournament Kicks Off at Ikeja Country Club with Record Entries
item.description: The 2026 O’jez Ladder table tennis tournament don kick off for Ikeja Country Club, and e get better than ever as over 300 players don register for the competition. Dis tournament na exclusive event fo...

item.title: University of South Florida doctoral students found dead; roommate charged with murder
item.description: Authorities in Tampa, Florida, have charged 26-year-old Hisham Abugharbieh with the premeditated murder of two University of South Florida doctoral students, Zamil Limon and Nahida Bristy. Limon's bod...

item.title: Remembering Brett Odgers: Canberra’s Griffin Plan Advocate
item.description: Brett James Odgers OAM, a lifelong Canberran and devoted champion of Walter Burley Griffin and Marion Mahony Griffin's vision for the national capital, has passed away at 86. Renowned for his deep kno...

item.title: NHRC Directs NMC to Investigate 'Inhumane' Resident Doctor Duty Hours
item.description: The National Human Rights Commission (NHRC) has taken serious note of allegations regarding excessively long and unregulated working hours for postgraduate medical residents in India, including those ...

item.title: K Kavitha forms Telangana Rashtra Sena after split from BRS, targets major parties
item.description: Former Bharat Rashtra Samithi (BRS) leader K Kavitha has launched a new political party named Telangana Rashtra Sena, marking a significant development in Telangana’s political landscape. The announce...

item.title: Government vows action against xenophobic violence following diplomatic concern from Ghana
item.description: South African authorities have committed to taking firm action against individuals involved in xenophobic attacks targeting Ghanaians and other foreign nationals, following diplomatic pressure from Gh...

item.title: Hasnat Khan, Princess Diana's former lover, now lives in Pakistan with his much younger wife
item.description: Hasnat Khan, the heart surgeon who was romantically involved with Princess Diana, has been photographed for the first time in years, now residing in Pakistan. He is running a heart hospital in Lahore ...

item.title: BJP Confident of Winning 110 Seats in First Phase of Assembly Elections 2026
item.description: The Assembly Elections 2026 in India are underway, and various political leaders are expressing confidence in their respective parties' performances. Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma, in a pre...

item.title: Australian entrepreneur builds community-focused gym model in New York
item.description: Sydney-born entrepreneur Dane McCarthy has carved out a niche in New York’s highly competitive fitness industry by introducing a distinctly Australian approach centred on community and social connecti...

item.title: Unauthorized Discord Group Gains Access to Anthropic’s Mythos AI Tool
item.description: A group of amateur sleuths on Discord gained unauthorized access to Anthropic’s powerful AI tool, Mythos, which was meant to be strictly restricted. The group exploited simple detective work and an ea...

item.title: Pendlebury leads Collingwood to 77-point Anzac Day win over Essendon with record fourth medal
item.description: Collingwood delivered a dominant Anzac Day performance at the MCG, defeating Essendon by 77 points in front of more than 92,000 fans, with veteran Scott Pendlebury producing one of the finest games of...

item.title: A practical 2026 guide to choosing the right bike for your riding style and budget
item.description: This beginner‑friendly guide helps readers select the right type of bike for their needs in 2026, focusing on comfort, terrain, and intended use rather than on a specific year. The article highlights ...

item.title: Federal court pauses deportation process for Humboldt Broncos crash driver pending review
item.description: A federal court judge has granted a last-minute stay affecting the legal proceedings involving the driver responsible for the 2018 Humboldt Broncos bus crash, a tragedy that killed 16 people and injur...

item.title: Nigerian Opposition Parties Plan Summit Amidst Allegations of APC Disruption
item.description: Wahala dey! As we all know, opposition parties for Nigeria don gather for Ibadan, Oyo State, to chop-plom and plan how to move forward politically. Dem wan find a better way to face APC. But, accordin...

item.title: DA Seeks P30 Billion in Aid for Farmers Facing Rising Costs
item.description: The Department of Agriculture (DA) is appealing to the national government for an additional ₱30 billion to assist farmers struggling with high fuel costs and production expenses. This request include...
